_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Test, evaluate, and verify hardware and/or software to determine compliance with defined specifications and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirements, testing protocols, approval gates, ongoing monitoring expectations, and the criteria for model retirement or replacement.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.617), RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.610).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.533). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [compliance, defined, determine, evaluate, hardware, software] vs WIDAI-only terms [approval, criteria, define, development, documentation, enforce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.882, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Test, evaluate, and verify hardware and/or software to determine compliance with" and "Define and enforce model development standards, including documentation requirem" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.652 > STS 0.533 (gap +0.119). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requirements] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [compliance, defined, determine, evaluate, hardware, software]. WIDAI-only: [approval, criteria, define, development, documentation, enforce].
